Labor productivity (output per hour), output, and hours worked indexes, by industry(1987 = 100)
Year Mining Productivity (output per hour) Mining Output Mining Hours worked Oil and gas extraction Productivity (output per hour) Oil and gas extraction Output Oil and gas extraction Hours worked products Output Beverages and tobacco products Hours worked Textile mills Productivity (output per hour) Textile mills Output Textile mills Hours worked Textile product mills Productivity (output per hour) Leather and allied products Output Leather and allied products Hours worked Paper Productivity (output per hour) Paper Output Paper Hours worked Printing and related support activities products Productivity (output per hour) Nonmetallic mineral products Output Nonmetallic mineral products Hours worked Primary metals Productivity (output per hour) Primary metals Output Primary metals
